Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.http.HttpBody

Packages that use HttpBody
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.entity
Next-generation HTTP body (entity) implementations.
org.apache.juneau.http.part
Next-generation HTTP part (query/form/path) implementations.
org.apache.juneau.http.resource
Next-generation HTTP resource types — bodies bundled with associated headers.
org.apache.juneau.http.response
Next-generation HTTP response types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.

  • Uses of HttpBody in org.apache.juneau.http

    Subinterfaces of HttpBody in org.apache.juneau.http
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    HttpResource
    An HttpBody that carries additional headers (such as Content-Type, Content-Disposition, or Content-Language) alongside the body.

  • Uses of HttpBody in org.apache.juneau.http.entity

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.entity that implement HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ByteArrayBody
    An HttpBody backed by a raw byte array.
    final class 
    FileBody
    A repeatable HttpBody that streams content from a File.
    final class 
    HttpBodyBean
    A mutable wrapper around an HttpBody that allows overriding the content type.
    final class 
    MultipartBody
    An HttpBody that serializes a multipart/form-data message (RFC 7578).
    final class 
    ReaderBody
    A non-repeatable HttpBody that streams character content from a Reader, encoded as UTF-8.
    final class 
    StreamBody
    A non-repeatable HttpBody that streams content from an InputStream.
    final class 
    StringBody
    An HttpBody backed by a UTF-8 string.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.entity that return HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpBody
    MultipartBody.MultipartPart.body()
    Returns the value of the body record component.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.entity with parameters of type HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpBodyBean
    HttpBodyBean.of(HttpBody body)
    Creates an HttpBodyBean wrapping the given body and retaining its content type.
    static HttpBodyBean
    HttpBodyBean.of(HttpBody body, String contentType)
    Creates an HttpBodyBean wrapping the given body with the specified content type.
    static MultipartBody.MultipartPart
    MultipartBody.MultipartPart.of(String name, String filename, String contentType, HttpBody body)
    Creates a part from an arbitrary HttpBody.
    Constructors in org.apache.juneau.http.entity with parameters of type HttpBody
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    MultipartPart(String name, String filename, String contentType, HttpBody body)
    Creates an instance of a MultipartPart record class.

  • Uses of HttpBody in org.apache.juneau.http.part

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.part that implement HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    PartList
    An ordered, immutable list of HttpPart instances that also implements HttpBody for URL-encoded form submission.

  • Uses of HttpBody in org.apache.juneau.http.resource

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.http.resource that implement HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    HttpResourceBean
    Default immutable implementation of HttpResource: an HttpBody bundled with a set of associated headers (such as Content-Type, Content-Disposition, or Content-Language).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.resource that return HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpBody
    HttpResourceBean.getBody()
    Returns the underlying body.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.resource with parameters of type HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.of(HttpBody body)
    Creates an HttpResourceBean wrapping the given body with no additional headers.
    static HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.of(HttpBody body, List<HttpHeader> headers)
    Creates an HttpResourceBean wrapping the given body and headers.

    Method
    Description

    HttpResponseMessage.getBody()

    Method
    Description

    BasicHttpException.setContent(HttpBody value)
    Sets the response body.

    BasicHttpResponse.setContent(HttpBody value)
    Sets the response body.
    BasicHttpResponse
    BasicHttpResponse.withBody(HttpBody value)

  • Uses of HttpBody in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.client that implement HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    RecordStreamBody
    A streaming HTTP request body that emits its content through a token/record-streaming cursor.
    final class 
    SerializerBody
    A repeatable HttpBody that serializes a POJO straight to the transport output stream.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with parameters of type HttpBody
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.body(HttpBody value)
    Sets the request body directly from an HttpBody.
    static TransportBody
    TransportBody.of(HttpBody body)
    Wraps the given HttpBody as a TransportBody.
